title: Forward Deployed Engineering | Deloitte US
full_text:
Forward Deployed Engineering | Deloitte US
Link opens in a new tab
opens in new window
Skip to main content
Welcome to Deloitte
If we have selected the wrong experience for you, please change it above.
Forward deployed engineering
Powering AI transformation at the speed of business
Unlock AI’s potential with a dedicated team of technical and business-focused talent. Our forward deployed engineering (FDE) teams work with you at every stage to fast-track AI adoption—using AI-enabled platforms to help you improve decision-making and deliver value faster.
Talk to our team
Forward deployed engineering
Powering AI transformation at the speed of business
Unlock AI’s potential with a dedicated team of technical and business-focused talent. Our forward deployed engineering (FDE) teams work with you at every stage to fast-track AI adoption—using AI-enabled platforms to help you improve decision-making and deliver value faster.
Talk to our team
Talk to our team
Get in touch
Turn AI promise into enterprise value with FDE
As enterprises today race to adopt AI, few are realizing its true value. Moving AI pilots into production and measurable outcomes is hard, often due to stalled pilots, low adoption and limited AI talent. That’s where Deloitte FDE comes in.
Deloitte deploys nimble, vertically focused teams that work side by side with you and your team, focused on the business outcomes you need and the technical capabilities required to deliver them at speed. Together, we use AI-enabled platforms to help solve your high-priority problems and launch production-ready solutions. The result is faster delivery and progress that helps you move your business forward.
Let’s make this work.
To view this video, change your advertising and targeting cookie settings.
Update
Manage cookie preferences
What makes Deloitte FDE different?
Compared to traditional models, Deloitte FDE teams are designed to deliver outcomes-based results that scale over time. Here’s how we work:
Lead with the business issue
FDE starts by homing in on your high-impact business problem and defining clear, measurable success criteria. Teams then deliver in short, time-bound sprints tied directly to your business performance metrics—helping ensure solutions are adoption-ready, compliant and focused on value.
Always-on, client-embedded
Deloitte FDE specialists are embedded with your team, delivering value around the clock. This close collaboration builds trust, ensures rapid alignment, and enables real-time problem-solving. Solutions are shaped through ongoing feedback loops that reflect your business’s unique context and needs.
Industry-specific skills
Deloitte FDE teams work at the heart of your business, bringing their sector-specific experience to deliver tailored solutions that help you drive growth, efficiency and impact by addressing unique sector challenges.
Small, cross-disciplinary teams
These pods of specialist professionals combine deep technical and functional knowledge with an ability to translate executive vision throughout the organization. Lean and nimble, these teams can help you accelerate decision-making, foster innovation and adapt quickly to evolving business needs.
Platform powered
Solutions are built and delivered using leading AI-enabled platforms that integrate with your ecosystem. Leveraging these platforms helps accelerate implementation while ensuring scalability, security and reliability.
Forward deployed engineering enables AI results you can count on
Faster value realization
Accelerate rollout of advanced solutions—from concept validation to operationalized solution, in days—enabling faster achievement of tangible benefits
Reduced development costs
Reduce solution development costs by enhancing efficiency and aligning with business needs early on
Enhanced scalability
Scale successful pilots across multiple areas of the business in a shorter time frame
Improved productivity
Boost workforce productivity, particularly for repetitive or high-volume tasks, through advanced automation and AI-driven solutions
Opens in new window
Deloitte AI & Engineering
Transform the heart of your business across products, platforms and operations
Organizations are navigating new challenges and constant tech disruption. Learn how our broader AI & Engineering capabilities can help you enhance products and services, boost efficiency, improve financial performance and get to market faster.
Learn more
Learn more
Connect with us
